CustomField.label: Penny Role
CustomField.description: Penny's coaching role description for this trail. Injected into Layer 1 of the Penny prompt to define her identity and coaching stance. Example: Coaching Companion — warm, structured, foundational.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Describe Penny's role for this trail. Example: Coaching Companion — warm, structured, foundational. This text is injected directly into Penny's prompt.
